labels.full_db_workflow: expected artifact counts and workflow steps

limitations: This manifest is non-production manual acceptance.
Synthetic/manual samples are not production quality evidence.
Real or desensitized production-scale labels remain an external dependency.
description: Manual acceptance evaluation dataset for FinancialAuditAI. This manifest records the dataset structure and evaluation intent. Set is_production_evaluation=true only after replacing placeholders with properly labeled public or desensitized samples.
safety_notes: Do not include real customer data.
Do not include API keys or provider secrets.
Use public, synthetic, or desensitized files only.
Do not mark this dataset as production evaluation until labels are reviewed.
